/usr/lib/ccache/gcc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libautoware_internal_perception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libautoware_internal_perception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/autoware_internal_perception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/autoware_internal_perception_msgs/msg/detail/segmentation_mask__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/mnt/hdd/autonomy/ws/Carla-autoware_interface/deps_ws/install/autoware_perception_msgs/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /mnt/hdd/autonomy/ws/Carla-autoware_interface/deps_ws/install/autoware_perception_msgs/lib/libautoware_perception_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libunique_identifier_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
